## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or console output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Hudhud version: [e.g. 0.5.1]
